# Panitumumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Panitumumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Panitumumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>8 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 10 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Panitumumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Vectibix is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with wild-type RAS metastatic colorectal cancer (mCRC):  in first-line in combination with Folfox or Folfiri. in second-line in combination...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>drug-induced osteoporosis（99.1%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（99.0%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（99.0%）</li>
<li>diabetic cataract（98.9%）</li>
<li>nuclear senile cataract（98.8%）</li>
<li>cortical cataract（98.8%）</li>
<li>craniostenosis cataract（98.8%）</li>
<li>mature cataract（98.8%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus type 2 associated cataract（98.8%）</li>
<li>immature cataract（98.8%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/panitumumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
